message:
feat(FJ-P2C-004-D2): implement forward-mode JVP + effect token system

fj-ad: Forward-mode JVP for all 24 supported primitives. jvp() computes
(primals, tangents) in a single forward pass. jvp_grad_first() convenience
wrapper. Property test validates JVP matches VJP for all inputs.

fj-dispatch: EffectContext with EffectToken tracking per-transform effects.
Tokens threaded through dispatch, finalized and recorded as evidence signal
(effect_token_count). 3 new tests: effect context ordering, signal presence,
cache key determinism.

360 workspace tests pass. Clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
